title: Taco Bell: Order Middleware - Enabling Delivery Orders at Massive Scale

description:
An exploration of using a serverless pipeline from a customer order (perhaps on a mobile phone) to the restaurant, to the delivery driver. This architecture integrates API Gateway, EventBridge, Lambda, Step-Functions and geofencing to fulfill orders on time at scale at low cost. Disclaimer: Taco Bell's facts and figures detailed during the course of this presentation have been approximated and were used for illustrative purposes only.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
